movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_frontright_01
movable_parts.motion: Caster wheel with 360-degree swivel around the vertical axis and continuous rolling
movable_parts.axis: Z for swivel, local X for roll

movable_parts.motion: Caster wheel with 360-degree swivel around the vertical axis and continuous rolling
movable_parts.axis: Z for swivel, local X for roll

movable_parts.motion: Caster wheel with 360-degree swivel around the vertical axis and continuous rolling
movable_parts.axis: Z for swivel, local X for roll

movable_parts.motion: Caster wheel with 360-degree swivel around the vertical axis and continuous rolling

movable_parts.name: sm_drawer1_a03_lockrotor_01
movable_parts.motion: Rotates to lock/unlock the top drawer

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan1_a03_biglid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinged lid that pivots upward to open

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan1_a03_smalllid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinged access lid that pivots upward, operated by the foot pedal

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan1_a03_lever_01
movable_parts.motion: Foot pedal that pivots downward to open the small lid

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan2_a03_biglid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinged lid that pivots upward to open

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan2_a03_smalllid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinged access lid that pivots upward, operated by the foot pedal

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan2_a03_lever_01
movable_parts.motion: Foot pedal that pivots downward to open the small lid

movable_parts.name: sm_arm_a03_01
movable_parts.motion: Monitor arm swivels horizontally at its base and the screen tilts vertically
movable_parts.axis: Z for swivel, local X for tilt

special_notes: Caster wheels have both swivel (vertical Z-axis) and roll (horizontal axis) joints. The foot pedal on each trash can should be kinematically linked to its small access lid. Drawers have sliding limits to prevent full removal. The monitor arm has multiple joints for full articulation.
grip_location: The main handle (`sm_base_a03_handle_01`) is for pushing the cart.
